name: Core Bots
description: Fundamental AI assistants and scraping workflows to automate daily operations.
painPoint: Daily administrative tasks consume up to 40% of employee time, causing operational bottlenecks.
highlightStat: Average 12 hours saved weekly per employee

name: SaaS
description: User retention, predictive churn, and smart support automation for software products.
painPoint: High churn rates and slow support response times kill SaaS valuations and customer trust.
highlightStat: Reduce churn by up to 18% with automated interventions

name: Fitness
description: Meal tracking, booking management, and retention campaigns for gyms and coaches.
painPoint: Gym members churn within the first 90 days due to lack of engagement and manual onboarding.
highlightStat: Recover 15%+ of inactive gym members automatically

name: Marketing
description: Omni-channel repurposing, smart scoring, and ad budget optimizations.
painPoint: Marketing teams waste thousands on unoptimized ad spend and manual content formatting.

name: Travel
description: Itinerary builders, automated booking engines, and local guides.
painPoint: Manual itinerary creation and hotel/flight price tracking is incredibly tedious and time-sensitive.

name: Education
description: FAQ assistants, grading aids, and automated scheduler systems.
painPoint: Teachers and administrators spend more time on paperwork, grading, and scheduling than actual teaching.
highlightStat: Cut grading and admin overhead by 65%

name: Finance
description: Invoice processing, expense auditing, and automated payroll systems.
painPoint: Manual data entry leads to expensive billing errors, tax compliance risks, and delayed reporting.
highlightStat: 100% automated invoice processing and ledger sync

name: Legal
description: Contract review, case research helpers, and client intake bots.
painPoint: Law firms lose billable hours performing manual legal document reviews and client follow-ups.

name: E-Commerce
description: Cart recovery loops, smart inventory sync, and post-delivery follow-ups.
painPoint: E-commerce brands lose 70% of potential sales to cart abandonment and stock discrepancies.
highlightStat: Recover 12% to 22% of abandoned carts automatically

name: Real Estate
description: Lead qualifiers, visit schedulers, and property drip updates.
painPoint: Agents miss hot buyer leads because they can't answer inquiries within the critical 5-minute window.
highlightStat: 30-second response time for 100% of property inquiries

name: Healthcare
description: Pre-consultation patient intake, booking reminders, and diet check-ins.
painPoint: Clinics suffer from high appointment no-show rates and labor-intensive client check-ins.
highlightStat: Reduce appointment no-shows by up to 45%

name: Wealth & Trading
description: Portfolio rebalancers, index reports, and multi-asset price alert bots.
painPoint: Asset managers and active investors miss critical market triggers and delay rebalancing portfolios.
highlightStat: Zero-latency price alerts and automated asset adjustment

name: Web3
description: Whale wallet trackers and contract execution alerting networks.
painPoint: On-chain activity moves at lightspeed, making manual wallet monitoring and transaction analysis impossible.
highlightStat: Sub-second on-chain triggers and AI sentiment reports

name: AI Swarm
description: Parallel research swarms and autonomous pull request reviewers.
painPoint: Single-agent AI systems hallucinate or fail on complex multi-step workflows requiring peer review.
highlightStat: 5-agent swarms executing complex workflows in parallel

name: ML Engine
description: Pre-emptive behavioral predictions and seasonal inventory forecast models.
painPoint: Traditional logic fails to forecast demand or predict churn until it has already happened.
highlightStat: 94% accuracy in predicting customer churn behavior
